name: Beam Deflection Calculator
description: Industrial-grade beam deflection analysis tool based on Euler-Bernoulli beam theory, compliant with ISO 9001 and Six Sigma standards. Calculates maximum deflection, bending stress, and safety factors for simply supported beams under various loading conditions.

inputs.label: Beam Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Span length between supports, typical for structural steel beams in industrial racks (WERC standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Span length between supports, typical for structural steel beams in industrial racks (WERC standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mesnetler arasındaki açıklık uzunluğu, endüstriyel raflardaki yapısal çelik kirişler için tipiktir (WERC standardı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Stützweite zwischen den Auflagern, typisch für Baustahlträger in Industrieregalen (WERC-Standard).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de portée entre supports, typique pour les poutres en acier de structure dans les rayonnages industriels (norme WERC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del vano entre apoyos, típica para vigas de acero estructural en racks industriales (norma WERC).

inputs.label: Load Type
inputs.businessContext: Common load configurations in material handling and structural analysis per ISO 9001 design control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Common load configurations in material handling and structural analysis per ISO 9001 design control.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme taşıma ve yapısal analizde yaygın yük konfigürasyonları, ISO 9001 tasarım kontrolüne uygun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Übliche Lastkonfigurationen in der Materialhandhabung und Strukturanalyse gemäß ISO 9001 Designkontrolle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Configurations de charge courantes dans la manutention et l'analyse structurelle selon le contrôle de conception ISO 9001.
businessContext_i18n.es: Configuraciones de carga comunes en manejo de materiales y análisis estructural según control de diseño ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Point Load (P)
inputs.businessContext: Concentrated force applied at a specific point, typical for forklift impact or equipment loads.

businessContext_i18n.en: Concentrated force applied at a specific point, typical for forklift impact or equipment loads.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli bir noktaya uygulanan yoğun kuvvet, forklift darbesi veya ekipman yükleri için tipiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konzentrierte Kraft an einem bestimmten Punkt, typisch für Gabelstapleraufprall oder Ausrüstungslasten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Force concentrée appliquée en un point spécifique, typique pour l'impact de chariot élévateur ou les charges d'équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fuerza concentrada aplicada en un punto específico, típica para impacto de montacargas o cargas de equipo.

inputs.label: Uniformly Distributed Load (w)
inputs.businessContext: Load per unit length, e.g., conveyor belt or storage rack loading per linear meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Load per unit length, e.g., conveyor belt or storage rack loading per linear meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim uzunluk başına yük, örn. konveyör bandı veya depolama rafı yüklemesi (metre başına).
businessContext_i18n.de: Last pro Längeneinheit, z. B. Förderband- oder Regallast pro laufendem Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge par unité de longueur, par exemple, charge de convoyeur ou de rayonnage de stockage par mètre linéaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga por unidad de longitud, ej.: carga de cinta transportadora o estantería por metro lineal.

inputs.label: Load Position from Left Support (a)
inputs.businessContext: Distance from left support to point load application, used for asymmetric loading analysis.

label_i18n.fr: Position de la charge depuis l'appui gauche (a)
label_i18n.es: Posición de la carga desde el apoyo izquierdo (a)

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from left support to point load application, used for asymmetric loading analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sol mesnetten noktasal yük uygulama noktasına olan mesafe, asimetrik yükleme analizinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand vom linken Auflager zum Angriffspunkt der Punktlast, verwendet für asymmetrische Lastanalyse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de l'appui gauche au point d'application de la charge, utilisée pour l'analyse de charge asymétrique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde el apoyo izquierdo hasta la aplicación de la carga puntual, utilizada para análisis de carga asimétrica.

inputs.label: Young's Modulus (E)
inputs.businessContext: Material stiffness property, typical for steel (200 GPa) or aluminum (70 GPa) per ISO 6892-1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material stiffness property, typical for steel (200 GPa) or aluminum (70 GPa) per ISO 6892-1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme sertlik özelliği, çelik için tipik (200 GPa) veya alüminyum (70 GPa) ISO 6892-1'e göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Materialsteifigkeitseigenschaft, typisch für Stahl (200 GPa) oder Aluminium (70 GPa) gemäß ISO 6892-1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Propriété de rigidité du matériau, typique pour l'acier (200 GPa) ou l'aluminium (70 GPa) selon ISO 6892-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Propiedad de rigidez del material, típica para acero (200 GPa) o aluminio (70 GPa) según ISO 6892-1.

inputs.label: Moment of Inertia (I)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional property resisting bending, calculated from beam profile (e.g., I-beam, rectangular).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional property resisting bending, calculated from beam profile (e.g., I-beam, rectangular).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğilmeye karşı koyan kesit özelliği, kiriş profiline göre hesaplanır (örn. I-kiriş, dikdörtgen).
businessContext_i18n.de: Querschnittseigenschaft, die der Biegung widersteht, berechnet aus dem Trägerprofil (z. B. I-Träger, Rechteck).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Propriété de section transversale résistant à la flexion, calculée à partir du profil de la poutre (par exemple, poutre en I, rectangulaire).
businessContext_i18n.es: Propiedad de la sección transversal que resiste la flexión, calculada a partir del perfil de la viga (ej.: viga I, rectangular).

inputs.label: Yield Strength (σ_y)
inputs.businessContext: Material yield stress, typical for structural steel S235 (235 MPa) or S355 (355 MPa) per EN 10025.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material yield stress, typical for structural steel S235 (235 MPa) or S355 (355 MPa) per EN 10025.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme akma gerilmesi, yapısal çelik S235 (235 MPa) veya S355 (355 MPa) için tipik EN 10025'e göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Materialfließspannung, typisch für Baustahl S235 (235 MPa) oder S355 (355 MPa) gemäß EN 10025.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte d'élasticité du matériau, typique pour l'acier de construction S235 (235 MPa) ou S355 (355 MPa) selon EN 10025.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión de fluencia del material, típica para acero estructural S235 (235 MPa) o S355 (355 MPa) según EN 10025.

rules.message: Load position (a) must be less than beam length (L).
Uniformly distributed load (w) must be greater than 0 for UDL load type.
Point load (P) must be greater than 0 for point load types.
Young's modulus, moment of inertia, and yield strength must be positive values.
Target safety factor should be between 1.0 and 5.0 per ISO 13822.

thresholds.message: Maximum deflection exceeds L/250 limit (typical for industrial beams per ISO 9001).
Maximum bending stress exceeds yield strength — risk of plastic deformation.
Actual safety factor is below the target value. Redesign recommended.
Material utilization below 60% — consider reducing cross-section to minimize waste (Lean principle).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
